text:
There lived a girl named Lily who often dreamed of flying. She had delicate wings on her shoulders that fluttered only in dreams. One evening, while gazing at the stars, she whispered to them, "If I ever fly, please bring me back beautiful galaxies."

Weeks passed, and Lily learned to dance like a bird. One moonlit night, under the stars she dreamed of, she leaped into the air. Her wings spread wide. She felt weightless, like she was flying. For hours she soared, discovering new worlds hidden within those twinkling dots.

When dawn crept into the sky, her wings tired, she plummeted back to earth. As she landed, her wings cracked open, revealing glowing galaxies inside.

"Thank you," she murmured softly.

From that day on, every night before sleeping, Lily repeated her wish. And then, every full moon, she'd visit one of those galaxies.

Years went by. Lily grew up. She started a bird
